items.label: Getting Started
items.content:
# ZYNQ

## Installation

ZYNQ is a WebRTC + games framework.
It combines peer-to-peer communication with a game library system.

No backend required.

items.label: Script Tag
items.content:
## Script Tag

Loads ZYNQ globally into `window.ZYNQ`.

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.2/index.min.js"></script>
```

After loading:
```js
window.ZYNQ
```

items.label: ES Module
items.content:
## ES Module (Side Effect Import)

This version only initializes global `window.ZYNQ`.

```js
import "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.2/index.min.js"
```

After import:
```js
window.ZYNQ.Peer
window.ZYNQ.games
```

items.label: Initialization
items.content:
## ZYNQ.games

### init(options?)
Initializes the game engine and loads the CDN database.

```js
await ZYNQ.games.init({
  mode: "all",
  search: "",
  sort: "name",
  src: "...",
  cdn: "..."
})
```

Options:
- mode: all | supported | favs
- search: initial query
- sort: name | category | etc
- src: JSON database URL
- cdn: thumbnail base URL

items.label: Game Model
items.content:
## Game Schema

Core entity schema used across the entire system.

```ts
Game {
  name: string,
  alias: string,
  url: string,
  thumb: string,
  category?: string,
  devices?: number[],

  isSupported: boolean,
  isFavorite: boolean
}
```

Rules:
- `isSupported` depends on device detection
- `isFavorite` is stored in localStorage
- All collections strictly follow this structure

items.label: Core Data Layer
items.content:
## Core Data Layer

Internal reactive state of the game engine.

```ts
config: {
  src: string,
  cdn: string
}

all: Game[]
filtered: Game[]
favorites: Set<string>
deviceType: number
history: string[]
```

items.label: View Layer
items.content:
## View Layer

Derived reactive outputs from Core Data Layer.

### list
Current filtered games
```ts
ZYNQ.games.list: Game[]
```

### total
Total loaded games
```ts
ZYNQ.games.total: number
```

### filteredCount
Filtered result size
```ts
ZYNQ.games.filteredCount: number
```

children.label: .search()
children.content:
### search(query)
Filters games by name or alias.

```js
ZYNQ.games.search("alien")
```

children.label: .getByAlias()
children.content:
### getByAlias(alias)
Returns a single game.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getByAlias("alien-hominid")
```

children.label: .getByCategory()
children.content:
### getByCategory(category)
Filters games by category.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getByCategory("shooter")
```

children.label: .filterSupported()
children.content:
### filterSupported()
Keeps only device-compatible games.

```js
ZYNQ.games.filterSupported()
```

children.label: .filterFavorites()
children.content:
### filterFavorites()
Keeps only favorite games.

```js
ZYNQ.games.filterFavorites()
```

children.label: .reset()
children.content:
### reset()
Resets filtered state back to full dataset.

```js
ZYNQ.games.reset()
```

children.label: .sortBy()
children.content:
### sortBy(field)
Sorts games by field (e.g. name, category).

```js
ZYNQ.games.sortBy("name")
```

children.label: .sortByPopularity()
children.content:
### sortByPopularity()
Sorts by play count.

```js
ZYNQ.games.sortByPopularity()
```

children.label: .shuffle()
children.content:
### shuffle()
Randomly shuffles current list.

```js
ZYNQ.games.shuffle()
```

children.label: .random()
children.content:
### random(limit)
Returns random subset of games.

```js
ZYNQ.games.random(3)
```

children.label: .getRandomOne()
children.content:
### getRandomOne()
Returns a single random game.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getRandomOne()
```

children.label: .toggleFavorite()
children.content:
### toggleFavorite(alias)
Toggles favorite state.

```js
ZYNQ.games.toggleFavorite("alien-hominid")
```

children.label: .isFavorite()
children.content:
### isFavorite(alias)
Checks if game is favorited.

```js
ZYNQ.games.isFavorite("alien-hominid")
```

children.label: .addToHistory()
children.content:
### addToHistory(alias)
Adds game to history (max 50 items).

```js
ZYNQ.games.addToHistory("alien-hominid")
```

children.label: .getHistory()
children.content:
### getHistory()
Returns full history as Game objects.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getHistory()
```

children.label: .clearHistory()
children.content:
### clearHistory()
Clears history storage.

```js
ZYNQ.games.clearHistory()
```

children.label: .isFavorite()
children.content:
### isFavorite(alias)
Checks favorite state.

```js
ZYNQ.games.isFavorite(alias)
```

items.label: Constructor
items.content:
## ZYNQ.Peer

```js
const peer = new ZYNQ.Peer({
  video: false,
  audio: false,
  txt: true
})
```

Creates a new peer instance.

- video: enable video calls
- audio: enable audio calls
- txt: enable data connections
- id: optional fixed peer id

children.label: .connect()
children.content:
### .connect()
Connects to another peer for data messaging.

```js
peer.connect("abc-123")
```

children.label: .send()
children.content:
### .send()
Sends a message to a peer (auto-connects if needed).

```js
peer.send("abc-123", "hello")
```

- supports "*" for broadcast

children.label: .call()
children.content:
### .call()
Starts a media call (video/audio).

```js
peer.call("abc-123", { video: true, audio: true })
```

children.label: .disconnect()
children.content:
### .disconnect()
Closes connection to a peer and disables reconnect.

```js
peer.disconnect("abc-123")
```

children.label: .acceptConnection()
children.content:
### .acceptConnection()
Accepts an incoming connection request.

```js
peer.acceptConnection("abc-123")
```

- moves peer from pending to active connection

children.label: .rejectConnection()
children.content:
### .rejectConnection()
Rejects an incoming connection request.

```js
peer.rejectConnection("abc-123")
```

children.label: ready
connection-request
open
children.content:
### Open
Fired when a data connection is successfully opened.

```js
peer.on('open', (peerId) => {})
```

children.label: message
children.content:
### Message
Triggered when a message arrives.

```js
peer.on('message', ({ from, data }) => {})
```

children.label: stream
children.content:
### Stream
Triggered when receiving a media stream.

```js
peer.on('stream', ({ from, stream }) => {})
```

children.label: close
children.content:
### Close
Triggered when a connection fully closes.

```js
peer.on('close', ({ id }) => {})
```

children.label: disconnect
children.content:
### Disconnect
Triggered when a peer disconnects or reconnect fails.

```js
peer.on('disconnect', ({ id }) => {})
```

children.label: error
children.content:
### Error
Triggered when an error happens.

```js
peer.on('error', (err) => {})
```

Types:
- peer
- data
- media
- reconnect_failed

children.label: reconnecting
children.content:
### Reconnecting
Triggered when auto-reconnect starts.

```js
peer.on('reconnecting', ({ id, attempt, delay }) => {})
```
